examples: Heidi rapturously exclaimed: "Oh, Clara, can you really?"
"My dear, dear aunt," she rapturously cried, "what delight!" What felicity!
Even people who have not yet read the novel will find the film rapturously engaging.
But the Kings kept coming and Mbiyozo stretched through Hines and Blair to score a rapturously-received try.
And I can assure you, Mr. President, that this visit will be rapturously received by the people of Ireland.
